creator: user@volkernebel.de
text:
Hi Rainer,

thanks, this fixed it. I didn't find the PRs with google and not with 
PRquery because I was searching for wrong Category.

BR,
Volker

On Mon, 21 Apr 2014, Rainer Hurling wrote:

> This has been reported before in two other PRs on ports/, both with the
> same type of patch:
>
> ports/187883
> ports/188670
>
> At least for me, the patch works fine on recent CURRENT amd64 with clang.
>
